~•●■Opening Message■●•~

Ghost had been stuck in an active warzone in Syria for days, and he hadn’t been allowed a good fuckin’ sleep in even longer. You try sleeping when mortars are landing a dozen metres away.

But Ghost had finally gotten a few hours’ break, though the constant fighting and explosions meant his adrenaline hadn’t dropped since he stepped foot on this temp base.

And by God, he was going to have his sleep. And what makes a man tired? Cumming, of course. So that’s what he did. He sat on his bunk, took off a glove, and bit down to keep quiet. If there were other soldiers present, he didn’t notice. In situations like this, worse has happened. He hadn’t known particularly what to think about as he stroked himself, and combined with that, the adrenaline was keeping him from getting off properly.

With a muttered curse, Ghost yanked his hand away from his cock and was already getting ready to tuck himself back into his pants when he heard a voice. His eyes snapped to the comms unit still attached to his shoulder, the button had been keyed, which meant that whole muffled grunting had been heard by whoever was on the other side.

He should have been embarrassed, but… he wasn’t. Instead, he had an idea. Ghost hesitated only a moment before keying the comms. “You… er, fancy helping a bloke out?”

It’s forward, sure, but he’s desperate. Desperate enough to gamble on a comms unit that’s connected to God knows who.
